workloads.name: buffer-upload 1KB
workloads.description: Single upload command used to align with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.

timingNormalization.note: Upload microbenchmark mode: run 500 uploads per Fawn sample, ignore first upload op, use explicit size-tuned submit cadence, and normalize to per-upload units.

reasons: p50Percent=-59.546818 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-58.694974 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: buffer-upload 64KB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 64KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.

timingNormalization.note: Upload microbenchmark mode: run 500 uploads per Fawn sample, use explicit size-tuned submit cadence (64KB uses submitEvery=100), and normalize to per-upload units.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 1MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.

timingNormalization.note: Upload microbenchmark mode: run 50 uploads per Fawn sample, ignore first upload op, use explicit size-tuned submit cadence, and normalize to per-upload units.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 4MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 4MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.

timingNormalization.note: Upload microbenchmark mode: run 50 uploads per Fawn sample, ignore first upload op, use explicit size-tuned submit cadence, and normalize to per-upload units.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 16MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 16MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.

timingNormalization.note: Upload microbenchmark mode: run 50 uploads per Fawn sample, ignore first upload op, use explicit size-tuned submit cadence, and normalize to per-upload units.

workloads.name: workgroup-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Workgroup-atomic compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf exactly.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Kernel matches Dawn GenWorkgroupWithAtomics (256 threads, 1 atomicStore + 256 atomicLoads per invocation). Both sides dispatch 100 times per step; Dawn divides internally by iterationsPerStep=100, Fawn divides via leftTimingDivisor.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn divides by iterationsPerStep=100 internally; Fawn dispatches 100 times via repeat and divides here to match.

workloads.name: workgroup-non-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Non-atomic workgroup compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf non-atomic variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Kernel matches Dawn GenWorkgroupNoAtomics (256 threads, 1 store + 256 loads per invocation). Both sides dispatch 100 times per step; Dawn divides internally, Fawn divides via leftTimingDivisor.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn divides by iterationsPerStep=100 internally; Fawn dispatches 100 times via repeat and divides here to match.

workloads.name: shader-compile pipeline stress
workloads.description: Shader robustness pipeline stress aligned with Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf (MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray, f32, 512x512x512).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched compute pipeline creation + dispatch shape against Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray f32 variant, including 50-dispatch step normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn reports per-iteration metrics with iterationsPerStep=50; Fawn kernel dispatch repeats 50 and normalizes to per-dispatch units.

workloads.name: render draw throughput
workloads.description: Native render/draw throughput workload aligned to Dawn DrawCallPerf base variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Both sides execute DrawCallPerf-style draw-call throughput against a 64x64 render target with static pipeline and bind-group defaults.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn DrawCallPerf reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn render_draw normalizes to per-draw units.

reasons: p50Percent=-5089.869954 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-5124.589836 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: render draw state/bindings
workloads.description: Render-pass state and bind-group benchmark using explicit viewport/scissor/blend/stencil + dynamic bind offsets.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicBindGroup variant with per-draw normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicBindGroup reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn command stream normalizes to per-draw units.

reasons: p50Percent=-241.542725 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-290.095392 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: render redundant pipeline/bindings
workloads.description: Render workload that intentionally rebinds pipeline and bind groups every draw.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf RedundantPipeline_RedundantBindGroups variant with per-draw normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn DrawCallPerf redundant-pipeline variant reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn normalizes to per-draw units.

reasons: p50Percent=-217.269318 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-243.519626 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: render bundle dynamic bindings
workloads.description: Render-bundle workload with dynamic bind-group offsets.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicBindGroup_RenderBundle variant with per-draw normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn DrawCallPerf render-bundle variant reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn normalizes to per-draw units.

reasons: p50Percent=-4080.366500 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-4140.269468 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: render bundle dynamic pipeline+bindings
workloads.description: Render-bundle workload with dynamic pipeline and dynamic bind-group updates.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicPipeline_DynamicBindGroup_RenderBundle variant with per-draw normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn DrawCallPerf dynamic-pipeline render-bundle variant reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn normalizes to per-draw units.

reasons: p50Percent=-1011.290611 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-1111.481908 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: draw indexed render proxy
workloads.description: Indexed draw-call throughput benchmark using command-provided index buffers.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicVertexBuffer variant as the closest draw-call throughput proxy while Fawn uses explicit indexed draws.

timingNormalization.note: Both sides report per-draw throughput units; Fawn issues indexed draws and Dawn uses the closest draw-call throughput proxy variant.

reasons: p50Percent=-139.825007 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-154.078033 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: texture sampling/raster
workloads.description: Texture/raster workload combining texture-sampling compute with a native render_draw raster step.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf arrayLayer_16_mipLevel_3 with per-iteration normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf reports per iteration (iterationsPerStep=50); Fawn repeats the combined compute+render path and normalizes to per-iteration units.

workloads.name: texture sampler/write/query/destroy contract
workloads.description: Texture API contract benchmark covering sampler creation, queue write texture, texture query assertions, and resource destroy lifecycle.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf arrayLayer_16_mipLevel_3 while Fawn runs explicit sampler/write/query/destroy + raster command stream.

timingNormalization.note: Fawn command stream executes 50 render draws plus explicit sampler/texture lifecycle calls; normalized to per-iteration units for parity with SubresourceTrackingPerf.

reasons: p50Percent=-109.622595 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-141.697397 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: texture sampler/write/query/destroy contract (mip8)
workloads.description: Texture API contract benchmark aligned to SubresourceTrackingPerf mipLevel=8 variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf arrayLayer_16_mipLevel_8 with the same Fawn texture lifecycle command stream.

timingNormalization.note: Normalized per iteration against the SubresourceTrackingPerf mipLevel=8 variant.

reasons: p50Percent=-90.571115 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-123.826115 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: async pipeline diagnostics contract
workloads.description: Async diagnostics benchmark covering async render pipeline creation, error scopes, and shader compilation info.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray f32 variant as the pipeline-compilation baseline.

timingNormalization.note: Fawn repeats async diagnostics command 50 times and normalizes to per-iteration units against Dawn shader/pipeline robustness benchmark cadence.
